docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION OEX HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION JAN-23-2012 AS TO DEFENDANT ELEANOR'S OF CALIFORNIA, A CORPORATION, DOES 1 THROUGH 50 INCLUSIVE, ELEANOR S. NILSSON NO APPEARANCE. ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $1000.00. MIKE PURCELL APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. THE SANTA CRUZ SHERIFF'S DEPT SERVED WARRANT ON THE DEFENDANT DECEMBER 09, 2011. AND SET THE HEARUNG DATE FOR TODAY IN DEPT 514. CASE CALLED ON THE RECORD AT 2:45. JUDGE: DONALD J. SULLIVAN. CLERK; S. VANTREE. REPORTER: S. WONG #11288.

calendar.matters:
Order Of Examination
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 No Appearance; Order To Arrest
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Caritas Management Corp, and witness Grivel Mora-Rogers , was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Karl Craig.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 810 Gonzalez Drive #8G, San Francisco, CA 94132.
The lease is forfeited.
Holdover Damages - $404.26
Costs - $365.00
Total - $769.26

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued For Letter To Mar-29-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
